title: V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners:
V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners!
